text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've been requested to make a video by the
person in charge of the academy's PR. As we're
getting ready...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you agreed to help on such short
notice!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! It is but my fate to be drawn to
the stage!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, let us carve my beauty into the digital
world!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whoagh! You're as charming as ever today!
...Victory!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Of course we are! I'm gonna be the flower
garnishing my oshi's sunny stage!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Both your spirit and your costume are stunning!
It's as if I'm escorting you into high society.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... thank you! Ohhh, I'm sho glab to be
alibe... I'm sho glab I made this for my Umas'
shake!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oho. So, you've put special attention into your
outfit, yes?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's right! I've already thought up at least a
hundred different design ideas for how to
accentuate the cuteness of all the other
Umamusume while we race!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The most important thing is using white as a base
color! I was very careful to pick a material that
would really make the other racers pop, and I did
a pretty good job if I do say so myself!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, and I chose a color scheme meant to blend in
with the colors of all the others!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and the reason for all the little accessories
sprinkled all over was because I wanted to be like
an accessory to the other Umas! To complement
them! And then, after that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Ah! My apologies! I got carried away! So sorry!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Bravo! You've thought long and hard about each
article of clothing!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
While running on the turf yourself, you also
perceive its stage from the eyes of a director—a
Renaissance girl if I've ever known one!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And more than anything... beyond that attention
to detail lies the will and desire to produce the
greatest of races, for yourself and for your
opponents.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The footage we're shooting today is meant to
bring in new students, correct? I feel confident
entrusting the details to you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What? What?! You want to give that kind of responsibility to me?! Wh-wh-what should I do, Trainer?!
choice_data_list:
Let's make the greatest video that you can think
of!

Let's make the greatest video that you can think
of!

Maybe it would be good for you both to
collaborate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What? What?! You want to give that kind of responsibility to me?! Wh-wh-what should I do, Trainer?!
choice_data_list:
Let's make the greatest video that you can think
of!

Let's make the greatest video that you can think
of!

Maybe it would be good for you both to
collaborate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Opera O's magnificent existence alone banishes
darkness from the world! It'd be a crime for me to
monopolize the production!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
One who shines light upon the world is essentially
the sun itself! I want that image at the forefront!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The sun... My, that has a glorious ring to it. Tell
me more!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
G-g-give me a minute... I think I'm about to
explode with joy! I swear on this outfit I'll make
the best video ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the video production proceeds under
Agnes Digital's direction.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...And that's a wrap! I knew having you on board
was a game-winning call!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All that's left is to edit everything. ...So, uh...
Should I go ahead and do that as well?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes, it is best to let others take the stage.
The Overlord shall sit back and await the
beautiful final product.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... Bwilliant to da berry end... I swear, I'll
simp for her as long as I live!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what kind of video it'll end up being.
Full of anticipation, we disperse for the day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if you can't see which path to take.
Even if you lose sight of the guidepost pointing
you toward tomorrow...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...You'll definitely find it—your own personal sun!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come, let us aim for glory together! Haaah ha ha
ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A place where ambitions take flight.
Soar toward your dreams! Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
How about "Opera O's smile lights up the world"
for our concept?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Beautiful! There are no better words to convey
said message. What would you say to becoming
the promoter for my concerts?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Nngh?! Y-you can't mean that! Oh, I am going to explooooode!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, the number of applications to the
academy increase, making the promotion video a
huge success!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! Good thinking! I'm just dying to see Opera
O at work!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then, why don't I write the script and you do the
editing? With two leads, we'll have a huge hit on
our hands!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait a minute... You mean I'm going to be in your story?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
R-r-remember, we're planning to film this! Don't
you think adding me would be taking too many
liberties?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And... action! Come with me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, so this is Tracen Academy?! From here, I
shall take my very first step as Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
...Now, you're going to play an older student.
Come stand here and block my path!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! I wonder if a greenhorn like yourself
even has what it takes to survive.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Very good! As magnificent as the opening to an
epic poem!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I met you. It's thanks to you that I
could become the Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... I won't lose next time. Our real fight
starts now!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And that's a wrap! I think we've done a fine job.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Pwaaaah! Gasp! Apologies! We were so close the whole time! I didn't touch you, did I?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of touching... That's right! I completely
forgot the scene where I cradle you in my arms
after you fall down in exhaustion!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
KYAAAGHK?! I don't think I'm going to survive
this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital puts her life on the line and
manages to finish all the filming!
